_comment: The Studio Workspace — your active thinking context across the six environments. Studio-LOCAL state, committed to this repo. NOT an Obsidian mirror and never written back to the vault. Keep it public-safe: pointers and short notes only — NO absolute paths, NO vault/manuscript bodies, NO secrets. Every field is optional except schemaVersion; the app degrades gracefully when a field is missing. Copy this to workspace.json and edit by hand.
status: active — one of: active | paused | resting
focus: one short line: the through-line of your attention right now
approvedFormationTopic: an emerging term or concept id you've deliberately promoted
openQuestions: A question you are holding, in your own words
todayNote: optional short note to surface in Today
